test.name: Caso de teste 01: Abrir o aplicativo Totvs

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://github.com/appium/appium/blob/master/docs/en/writing-running-appium/server-args.md | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias |

test.name: Caso de teste 02: Realizar Login

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` appears on current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Timed out after 15620ms waiting for the root AccessibilityNodeInfo in the active window. Make sure the active window is not constantly hogging the main UI thread (e.g. the application is being idle long enough), so the accessibility manager could do its work

kw.name: Element Should Contain Text
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.

test.status: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Timed out after 15620ms waiting for the root AccessibilityNodeInfo in the active window. Make sure the active window is not constantly hogging the main UI thread (e.g. the application is being idle long enough), so the accessibility manager could do its work
